narrative: Enron used off-balance-sheet special purpose entities to hide billions in debt; CFO and CEO indicted for securities fraud; largest US corporate bankruptcy at the time; 20,000 employees lost jobs and pensions
resolution: Bankruptcy December 2001; CEO Lay and CFO Fastow convicted; Arthur Andersen collapsed; Sarbanes-Oxley Act passed; employees lost 1.2 billion in retirement savings
